prompt: An abstract architectural diagram showing a simple request-response cycle transforming into a complex autonomous agent loop with multiple feedback arrows, filesystem access icons, and sub-agent coordination nodes connecting to a central brain. The transition from single arrow to circular multi-layered diagram represents the shift from simple prompts to autonomous agents. Dark background with neon cyan and amber accent lines, technical blueprint aesthetic, subtle glow effects on the agent loop --ar 16:9 --style technical-diagram

A sleek minimalist icon representing 'the harness' — a glowing mechanical harness/brake system wrapped around a brain icon, symbolizing infrastructure controlling AI execution. Three distinct sleek pillars/towers in a glowing data center environment. Left tower: sealed vault door with Claude logo, golden light emanating. Close-up of a high-tech vault door with 'Anthropic' glowing emblem, surrounded by floating secure data streams being proxy-filtered before entering. Developer hands holding an open laptop with 'OpenAI Agents SDK' manifested as code blocks and sandbox icons, showing developer ownership. Four circular icons arranged in a diamond pattern representing the four primitives: agent definition (person icon), session state (hourglass/clock icon), sandbox (container icon), credential isolation (lock icon). A comparison chart visualized: left side shows simple 'you → LLM → response' flow, right side shows complex multi-node 'agent brain → tools → sandbox → state → credentials → results' circular loop. A warning sign with dollar symbol, showing runtime costs stacking up like bricks into a wall. Spreadsheet visualization with three columns showing cost curves. Claude curve rises steeply after 150 hours, LangChain starts high at $39, OpenSDK stays relatively flat. Three trophy pedestals in winner's circle formation. Center (top): speed trophy labeled 'Claude' with lightning bolt. Left: flexibility trophy labeled 'LangChain' with multiple MODEL icons. Security comparison: three layers of protection. Top layer: proxy pattern with shield and filters between user and sandbox.
